rootCause: completionist/catalog and completionist/polish were sibling quests unlocked by completionist/v2 while depending on different one-way transformed trophy states (raw vs polished), allowing players to complete polish first and strand catalog without an ordering gate.
resolution: Linearized catalog onto completionist/polish with polished-item gates and expanded quest completable tests to fail when sibling quests share prerequisites but require opposite one-way transformation states without dependency ordering.
